opportunityId.description: ONLY the Opportunity ID (Salesforce 15 or 18 character ID). Extract from 'Opportunity ID: [value]' or 'Opp: [value]' or 'ID: [value]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Update opportunity 006xx000000ABCD to Closed Won', extract '006xx000000ABCD' only. Opportunity IDs start with '006'. This field is OPTIONAL - use if the ID is provided. If not provided, use 'name' instead.

name.description: ONLY the Opportunity name or partial name. Extract from 'opportunity [name]' or 'deal [name]' or 'opp [name]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Update the Acme Corp deal to Closed Won', extract 'Acme Corp' only. Partial matches are supported (e.g., 'Acme' will find 'Acme Corp Deal'). This field is OPTIONAL - use if opportunityId is not provided. At least one of 'opportunityId' or 'name' is REQUIRED.

accountId.description: ONLY the Account ID for filtering the opportunity search when using 'name'. Extract from 'Account ID: [value]' or 'for account [value]' patterns. This narrows down the search when multiple opportunities have similar names. Account IDs start with '001'. This field is OPTIONAL and only used for context when searching by name.

stageName.description: ONLY the new stage name value. Extract from 'Stage: [value]' or 'to [value]' or 'move to [value]' patterns. Example: if input is 'Update opportunity stage to Closed Won', extract 'Closed Won' only. Valid values: 'Prospecting', 'Qualification', 'Needs Analysis', 'Value Proposition', 'Id. Decision Makers', 'Perception Analysis', 'Proposal/Price Quote', 'Negotiation/Review', 'Closed Won', 'Closed Lost'. This field is REQUIRED.

closeDate.description: ONLY the close date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Extract from 'Close Date: [value]' or 'closing on [value]' or 'push to [value]' patterns. OPTIONAL - use when user specifies a new close date. If omitted for stage-only updates (e.g. 'Move to Qualification'), the existing close date is kept.
